metadata.description: Custom Claude Code plugins for codebase analysis and PR review workflows

plugins.name: as-designed-review
plugins.description: Analyze a codebase into as-built documentation, then compare against user-edited as-designed files to identify deviations

plugins.name: process-review
plugins.description: Triage, address, and respond to code review comments on GitHub PRs

plugins.name: day-1-review
plugins.description: Analyze code for structural debt — find what wouldn't exist if the codebase were correct from day 1
